analysis:
Based on your screening criteria:

**Best CSP:**
NFLX $90 strike, 2026-05-29, 35 DTE, $1.99/$2.05, delta 0.35, 23.4% annualized return
- High-quality pullback (30.9% from highs), 90% IVP, solid Growth tier stock

**Best Position Income CC:**
NVDA $210 strike, 2026-06-18, 55 DTE, $7.75/$7.90, delta 0.39, 26.2% annualized return
- Clean technical setup, reasonable delta, strong profit position

**LEAPS:**
No qualifying trades - all showing timing scores of 5 or "WAIT/WATCH" signals due to either expensive IVP (70%+) or stocks at 5-day lows

**Bull Call Spreads:**
None available

**IVP Environment:**
Elevated volatility environment with most quality names showing 70%+ IVP, favoring premium selling over buying - good for CSPs, challenging for LEAPS entry timing.
